title: rubus neanias
intro: Rubus neanias, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Raspberry Bramble, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus neanias include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried extract, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
